MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-28-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ACME CONSTRUCTION SUPPLY COMPANY, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS CONTINUED FROM MARCH 28, 2016 TO APRIL 7, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION, PER THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

DECLARATION OF KAREN MOON RE ACME CONSTRUCTION SUPPLY COMPANY, INC.S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (TRANSACTION ID # 58801875) FILED BY DEFENDANT ACME CONSTRUCTION SUPPLY COMPANY, INC. SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BAY TOOL & SUPPLY, INC.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-07-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ACME CONSTRUCTION SUPPLY COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO THE FIFTH CAUSE ACTION FOR WRONGFUL TERMINATION AND THE REQUEST FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED SUFFICIENT ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE CREATING A TRIABLE ISSUE WHETHER DEFENDANT'S PROFFERED REASON FOR TERMINATING MR. JIMENEZ'S EMPLOYMENT WAS PRETEXTUAL. (PLAINTIFFS' ADDITIONAL FACTS 1-26). DEFENDANT FAILED TO SATISFY ITS INITIAL SUMMARY ADJUDICATION BURDEN SHOWING THAT MR. CJ GOODMAN WAS NOT A MANAGING AGENT WHEN HE TERMINATED MR. JIMENEZ'S EMPLOYMENT AND THAT THE TERMINATION WAS NOT RATIFIED BY BAY TOOL. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER THAT TRACKS THE TENTATIVE RULING PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1312. THE RULING ON THE OJECTIONS ARE AS FOLLOWS: NUMBER 1 IS SUSTAINED; NUMBER 2 IS SUSTAINED; NUMBER 3 IS ORVERRULED; AND NUMBER 4 IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART (SUSTAINED AS TO WHAT OTHERS SAID AND OVERRULED AS TO WHAT MR. JIMENEZ SAID). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2016 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-11-2016 Continued To Sep-19-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Maureen McFadden of Law Offices of Maureen E. McFadden telephone number 510-835-5203 for Plaintiff Teodoso Jimenez.
Dennis Huie and Aaron Scolari of Rogers Joseph O'Donnell telephone number 415-956-2828 for Defendant Acme Construction.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling with additional language as to punitive damages. DEFENDANT ACME CONSTRUCTION SUPPLY COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION as to the fifth cause action for wrongful termination and the request for punitive damages is denied in its entirety. Plaintiff submitted sufficient admissible evidence creating a triable issue whether defendant's proffered reason for terminating Mr. Jimenez's employment was pretextual. (Plaintiffs' Additional Facts 1-26). Defendant failed to satisfy its initial summary adjudication burden showing that Mr. CJ Goodman was not a managing agent when he terminated Mr. Jimenez's employment and that the termination was not ratified by Bay Tool. The prevailing party is to prepare a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling pursuant to CRC 3.1312. The ruling on the ojections are as follows: Number 1 is sustained; Number 2 is sustained; Number 3 is orverruled; and Number 4 is sustained in part and overruled in part (sustained as to what others said and overruled as to what Mr. Jimenez said).

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2016 Continued To Apr-07-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ACME CONSTRUCTION SUPPLY COMPANY, INC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to April 7, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion, per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Feb-02-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MAUREEN MCFADDEN, ESQ. of Law Offices of Maureen McFadden, Tel No. 510-835-5203 appearing as the moving party;
No other apperances made in this matter.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. The Court orders as follows: At the request of the moving party, Attorney Maureen McFadden's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Teodoso Jimenez is taken off calendar.
